About News Publications Awards

Yikai Zhao

I am a third-year undergraduate student at Sun Yat-sen University (SYSU), majoring in Geographic Information Science with a minor in Computer Science and Technology (09/2023 – 06/2027, Expected).

My research interests lie in Large Language Models and Multimodal LLMs, with a current focus on LLM post-training, LLM reasoning, and LLM-based agents. I also have hands-on research experience in remote sensing foundation models, object detection, and land cover mapping.

News

May, 2026📝 Submitted a paper to NeurIPS 2026.
May, 2026📝 Submitted a paper to EMNLP 2026.

Mar, 2026🎉 One paper published in Remote Sensing (SCI, Q2): VHR Land Cover Mapping in the Pearl River Delta with Remote Sensing Foundation Models

Publications

† Equal Contribution   * Corresponding Author

2026

Investigating Very-High-Resolution Land Cover Mapping in the Pearl River Delta with Remote Sensing Foundation Models and Multi-Source Data Bayesian Fusion
Junshen Luo†, Yikai Zhao†, Mingyang Xuan, Jizhou Zheng, Yan Zhou*, Xiaoping Liu
Remote Sensing (SCI, Q2), 18(6), 897 · March 2026
[Paper] [Code] [Dataset]
My first co-first-authored paper! Congratulations to all co-authors! · Developed SDMAE foundation model and SBFNet; constructed PRD VHR land cover datasets; designed decision-level Bayesian fusion for complex delta mapping.
Robust Fine-Grained Oriented Ship Detection for Remote Sensing Imagery via Controllable Generative Pretraining
Da He, Haoran Liu, Zeyu Li, Yikai Zhao, Xikun Hu, Ping Zhong, Weijia Li, Qian Shi, Xiaoping Liu*, Yanfei Zhong, Liangpei Zhang
IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP, CCF-A, SCI Q1 TOP) · Accepted June 2026
[Paper]
Congratulations to all co-authors! · Built LAFI large fine-grained ship dataset; proposed COSD generative pre-training framework with diffusion-based data augmentation for rotated ship detection.

2025

PSODNet: Pre-trained Scene-aware Object Detection for Optical Remote Sensing Imagery
Haoran Liu, Da He*, Yikai Zhao, Qian Shi, Xiaoping Liu
IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS, CCF-B, SCI Q1 TOP) · October 2025
[Paper] [Code]
My first paper! Congratulations to all co-authors! · Proposed PSODNet with multi-head pre-training EON network and SORM module to suppress complex background noise for multi-scale remote sensing object detection.
